name: claude-agile
description: Agile methodology layer on top of ccpm. Adds methodology selection (Scrum/Kanban/Shape Up/Lean-XP), natural language PO intake, explicit agent roles (Scrum Master, Tech Lead, Developer, QA), ECC integration, and methodology-specific retrospectives. Requires ccpm for project management mechanics.

ccpm.description: Claude Code Project Manager — handles PRDs, epics, task decomposition, GitHub sync, parallel execution, and status tracking. claude-agile wraps ccpm commands with agile methodology workflows.

everything-claude-code.description: Provides /tdd, /verification-loop, and /security-scan commands used by implement and review workflows.
